next_recommended_actions: Run validate-project-pack inside the new template.
Run the initial smoke benchmark when ready.

planning_summary.initial_benchmark_intent: Prove the smallest end-to-end ADF path on one controlled lab-style fixture: bounded evidence in, canonical baseline and playbook JSON out, and a minimal HTML support view rendered without broad test expansion.
planning_summary.new_template_rationale: The current active templates cover release summarization, JSON validation, config drift detection, API contract checks, and smoke scaffolding. None are centered on evidence-first runtime mapping of a multi-service appliance, support-playbook generation for lab-versus-customer comparison, or HTML rendering from machine-readable baseline artifacts, so this work needs a dedicated template.
planning_summary.project_goal: Deploy Codex into a controlled AlgoSec Security Management Suite lab appliance on Rocky Linux 8, collect bounded runtime evidence, generate a trustworthy machine-readable baseline and support comparison playbooks, and render a simple HTML view for remote support sessions.
